title: DDM OS Reminder (org.churchofjesuschrist.dorm)
description: Configures DDM OS Reminder message preferences

ScriptLog.title: Script Log Path
ScriptLog.description: Path to the log file for the DDM reminder script.

DaysBeforeDeadlineDisplayReminder.title: Days Before Deadline: Display Reminder
DaysBeforeDeadlineDisplayReminder.description: Number of days before the deadline when reminders start being displayed.

DaysBeforeDeadlineBlurscreen.title: Days Before Deadline: Blur Screen
DaysBeforeDeadlineBlurscreen.description: Number of days before the deadline when blur-screen enforcement starts.

DaysBeforeDeadlineHidingButton2.title: Days Before Deadline: Hide Defer Button
DaysBeforeDeadlineHidingButton2.description: Number of days before the deadline when the secondary button is hidden.

DaysOfExcessiveUptimeWarning.title: Days of Excessive Uptime Warning
DaysOfExcessiveUptimeWarning.description: Number of days of excessive uptime before warning the user.

QuietPeriodMinutes.title: Quiet Period (Minutes)
QuietPeriodMinutes.description: Number of minutes after a user interaction during which baseline reminders are suppressed.

OutsideDisplayWindowPeriodicReminderDays.title: Outside Display Window Periodic Reminder (Days)
OutsideDisplayWindowPeriodicReminderDays.description: Interval in days for periodic reminders before the regular display window begins.

PastDeadlineRestartBehavior.title: Past Deadline Restart Behavior
PastDeadlineRestartBehavior.description: Controls restart workflow behavior after deadline. Valid values: Off | Prompt | Force.

DaysPastDeadlineRestartWorkflow.title: Days Past Deadline: Restart Workflow
DaysPastDeadlineRestartWorkflow.description: Number of days past deadline before activating restart workflow behavior.

PastDeadlineRestartMinimumUptimeMinutes.title: Past Deadline Restart Minimum Uptime (Minutes)
PastDeadlineRestartMinimumUptimeMinutes.description: Minimum uptime in minutes required before the past-deadline restart workflow is eligible to run.

PastDeadlineForceTimerSeconds.title: Past Deadline Force Timer (Seconds)
PastDeadlineForceTimerSeconds.description: Countdown duration in seconds shown by the past-deadline Force restart workflow.

PastDeadlineForceRedisplayDelaySeconds.title: Past Deadline Force Redisplay Delay (Seconds)
PastDeadlineForceRedisplayDelaySeconds.description: Delay in seconds before redisplaying the past-deadline Force restart dialog.

MinimumDiskFreePercentage.title: Minimum Disk Free Percentage
MinimumDiskFreePercentage.description: Percent of free disk space required before warning the user.

DisableButton2InsteadOfHide.title: Disable Secondary Button Instead of Hide
DisableButton2InsteadOfHide.description: Whether to disable the secondary button instead of hiding it when deferral is no longer allowed.

MeetingDelay.title: Meeting Delay (Minutes)
MeetingDelay.description: Delay in minutes before enforcing reminders around meetings.

DailyReminderTimes.title: Daily Reminder Times
DailyReminderTimes.description: Comma-separated local reminder times in 24-hour HH:MM format used by the heartbeat scheduler.

MinutesBeforeDeadlineReminderSchedule.title: Minutes Before Deadline Reminder Schedule
MinutesBeforeDeadlineReminderSchedule.description: Comma-separated minute thresholds before the effective enforcement deadline when final reminders are displayed.

AggressiveModePastDeadlineHours.title: Aggressive Mode Past Deadline (Hours)
AggressiveModePastDeadlineHours.description: Hours past the effective deadline before aggressive reminder mode starts.

AggressiveModeFrequencyMinutes.title: Aggressive Mode Frequency (Minutes)
AggressiveModeFrequencyMinutes.description: Minutes between reminders while aggressive past-deadline mode is active.

AcceptableAssertionApplicationNames.title: Acceptable Assertion Application Names
AcceptableAssertionApplicationNames.description: Space-delimited list of application name substrings used to allowlist display sleep assertions; matching assertions defer reminders up to the Meeting Delay.

OrganizationOverlayIconURL.title: Organization Overlay Icon URL
OrganizationOverlayIconURL.description: URL to the organization overlay icon image.

OrganizationOverlayIconURLdark.title: Organization Overlay Icon URL (Dark Mode)
OrganizationOverlayIconURLdark.description: URL to the organization overlay icon image used when the interface is in Dark Mode. Falls back to OrganizationOverlayIconURL when unset.

SwapOverlayAndLogo.title: Swap Overlay And Logo
SwapOverlayAndLogo.description: Whether to swap the overlay icon and primary logo positions.

DateFormatDeadlineHumanReadable.title: Deadline Date Format (Human Readable)
DateFormatDeadlineHumanReadable.description: strftime format string used to render the deadline date for users.

DateFormatDeadlineHumanReadableLocalized.title: Deadline Date Format (Human Readable) (French)
DateFormatDeadlineHumanReadableLocalized.description: Localized French override for deadline date format (human readable).

DateFormatDeadlineHumanReadableLocalized.title: Deadline Date Format (Human Readable) (French — Canada)
DateFormatDeadlineHumanReadableLocalized.description: Localized French — Canada override for deadline date format (human readable).

DateFormatDeadlineHumanReadableLocalized.title: Deadline Date Format (Human Readable) (English — United Kingdom)
DateFormatDeadlineHumanReadableLocalized.description: Localized English — United Kingdom override for deadline date format (human readable).

DateFormatDeadlineHumanReadableLocalized.title: Deadline Date Format (Human Readable) (Japanese)
DateFormatDeadlineHumanReadableLocalized.description: Localized Japanese override for deadline date format (human readable).
